meta.defaultTitle: Chahine Seafood — From the heart of the sea to your heart
meta.defaultDescription: Lebanon's fresh-seafood sandwich house since 1978. Ten branches, one family, one obsession with the catch of the day. Order from the nearest branch on WhatsApp.

hero.tagline: From the heart of the sea to your heart.
hero.subline: Lebanon's fresh-seafood sandwich house. Ten branches, one family, one obsession with the catch of the day.

signatureDish.description: A handful of fresh-caught fillet. A buttered baguette, toasted till it cracks. Lemon, tartare, a few pickles for bite. The sandwich that built this house.
signatureDish.imagePlaceholder: Signature fish sandwich · cutout from IG pipeline

menuPreview.description: Sandwiches, burgers, platters, family meals and everything you'd expect from a Lebanese fish house.

branchesTeaser.description: From Tripoli to Saida, there is almost certainly a Chahine Seafood closer to you than you think.

story.body: We started small, in 1978, with a fisherman's ambition and a few good recipes from a Lebanese grandmother. Four decades and ten branches later, the fish is still picked in the morning and the bread is still toasted by hand. Nothing about that part will change.

footer.tagline: From the heart of the sea to your heart.

menu.subhead: Every Chahine Seafood dish, organised into the categories you'll recognise from any of our branches.

itemDetail.orderFromBranchHint: Tap any branch to start your order on WhatsApp with this item pre-filled.

branchesPage.subhead: Ten Chahine Seafood locations across Lebanon, from Tripoli in the north to Saida in the south. Every branch takes orders on WhatsApp.

aboutPage.tagline: From the heart of the sea to your heart.

paragraphs.one: Chahine Seafood is a Lebanese sandwich house built around one idea: take the day's catch from the Mediterranean coast, fry it the moment someone orders, and hand it over on a toasted baguette before the crust has time to cool.
paragraphs.two: That idea now lives in ten branches, strung along the country from Tripoli in the north through Byblos, Kaslik, Dekwaneh, Hamra, Cola, the Southern Suburb, Khaldeh and Aley, all the way down to Saida. Same menu card in every kitchen, same pickles, same tartare, same crispy fillet that put the name on the map.
paragraphs.three: Between the branches, the giveaways, the winners and the late-night runs for a Chahine's Shrimp sandwich, a community of more than sixty-eight thousand regulars follows along on Instagram. We do not call them customers. We call them the people we feed.

contactPage.subhead: Quickest routes to us: a WhatsApp to your nearest branch, or a DM on Instagram. We reply same-day.
contactPage.socialsHint: For menu questions, feedback, or just saying hi — DM on Instagram works best.
contactPage.branchesHint: Tap any branch to open WhatsApp and start a conversation. Order, ask about a dish, or check availability.
